summary: Test suite covers core retention policy logic well (age, size, keep-latest-N, dry-run, multi-workflow scenarios), but has significant gaps: no CLI testing (cleanup.py is untested), no fixture loading tests, no error handling scenarios (invalid JSON, missing files, parse failures), no integration tests, and no evidence of tests running through ACT as explicitly required. Lacks edge case coverage (boundary timestamps, zero-size artifacts, policy edge cases). Tests read clearly but miss pytest patterns (fixtures, parametrization) and don't demonstrate TDD methodology as specified. Would catch regressions in the core ArtifactCleaner class but miss issues in the actual tool execution, file I/O, argument parsing, and GitHub Actions workflow.
